tasks.subject: Task 1: Spec 갱신 (§7.2 / §7.5 / §7.10 / §10)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 시안 lock 결정사항을 spec에 반영. §7.2 출근 라벨('퇴근'→'외근', '연결끊김'→'점검 필요') + §7.5 대시보드(위젯 5→4, Hero 4 KPI + 빠른 액션, 비대칭 2x2 그리드, Insight 띠, 진행률 게이지 테마별 분기) + §7.10 디자인 시스템(6 테마 토큰 schema, CSS variable + data-theme/data-mode, 폰트 매트릭스, 금지사항) + §10 R3 템플릿(체크박스 + 산출물 필드).

**Files:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md

**Verify:** `git diff`로 네 구간 변경 확인 + 시안 정본과 용어·키 일치

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md"],"verifyCommand":"git diff --stat docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md","acceptanceCriteria":["§7.2 4상태 UI 라벨 명시","§7.5 위젯 4종 + 비대칭 그리드 + Insight 띠 + 게이지 테마 분기","§7.10 6 테마 token schema + CSS var 규칙 + 금지사항","§10 R3 체크박스+산출물 템플릿","게이미피케이션 단어 0건"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: v2 renderer를 _legacy/renderer-v1/로 격리
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `src/renderer/` 전체를 `git mv`로 `_legacy/renderer-v1/`에 이동(히스토리 보존). vitest/i18next-parser include 갱신. electron.vite.config 수정 없음.

**Files:** src/renderer/* (→ _legacy/renderer-v1/*), vitest.config.ts, i18next-parser.config.js

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck:node` + `_legacy/renderer-v1/` 9 엔트리 + main/shared/preload에서 legacy 경로 import 0건

```json:metadata
{"files":["_legacy/renderer-v1/","vitest.config.ts","i18next-parser.config.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck:node && test -d _legacy/renderer-v1","acceptanceCriteria":["9 엔트리 이동 완료","git log --follow로 히스토리 보존 확인","src/main·shared·preload에서 legacy import 0건","typecheck:node 0 errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 새 src/renderer/ 빈 껍데기
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 부팅 가능한 최소 렌더러 껍데기. index.html(data-theme/data-mode 기본) + main.tsx + App.tsx(Rolestra R3 1줄) + env.d.ts + i18n(빈 locales) + styles/global.css(최소 reset).

**Files:** src/renderer/index.html, main.tsx, App.tsx, env.d.ts, i18n/index.ts, i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, styles/global.css

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/index.html","src/renderer/main.tsx","src/renderer/App.tsx","src/renderer/env.d.ts","src/renderer/i18n/index.ts","src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json","src/renderer/styles/global.css"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && npm run typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["electron-vite dev 부팅 성공","Rolestra R3 1줄 렌더","typecheck:web 0 errors","IPC 호출 0건"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 패키지 추가 + Tailwind/PostCSS 설정
tasks.description:
**Goal:** tailwindcss/postcss/autoprefixer + @radix-ui(slot/tooltip/separator) + framer-motion + cva + clsx 설치. tailwind.config.ts는 **하드코딩 색 0건**(모두 var 참조), darkMode ['selector', '[data-mode="dark"]']. global.css에 @tailwind 지시문 추가.

**Files:** package.json, tailwind.config.ts, postcss.config.js, src/renderer/styles/global.css

**Verify:** `npm install && npm run build` + tailwind.config.ts에 `#|rgb(` 0건

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","tailwind.config.ts","postcss.config.js","src/renderer/styles/global.css"],"verifyCommand":"npm install && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["8 패키지 추가 설치 성공","tailwind.config에 하드코딩 색 0건","darkMode 셀렉터 [data-mode=dark]","build exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: theme-tokens.jsx → TS 정식화 + tokens.css 자동 생성
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `docs/Rolestra_sample/theme-tokens.jsx`의 6 토큰 객체를 TypeScript 정식화(`theme-tokens.ts` + `THEMES` 맵). 동시에 `tokens.css` 6 블록(`[data-theme][data-mode]`) 자동 생성. `tools/theme/extract-tokens.ts` 스크립트 + `npm run theme:build` / `theme:check`(idempotent 검증).

**Files:** src/renderer/theme/theme-tokens.ts, src/renderer/styles/tokens.css, tools/theme/extract-tokens.ts, package.json (scripts), src/renderer/styles/global.css (import tokens.css), src/renderer/index.html (font imports)

**Verify:** `npm run theme:build && npm run theme:check` exit 0 + `grep -rE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}' src/renderer/components` → 0

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/theme/theme-tokens.ts","src/renderer/styles/tokens.css","tools/theme/extract-tokens.ts","package.json","src/renderer/styles/global.css","src/renderer/index.html"],"verifyCommand":"npm run theme:build && npm run theme:check","acceptanceCriteria":["THEMES 6 키 정확","tokens.css 6 블록 + :root 폴백","theme:build deterministic (재실행 diff 0)","game 용어 0건","components 하드코딩 색 0건"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ThemeProvider + themeStore + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** zustand persist store(rolestra.theme.v1) + ThemeProvider(document.documentElement.dataset.theme/mode 세팅) + useTheme() 훅. index.html에 깜빡임 방지 inline script(localStorage 선로드). Vitest 스냅샷/동작 테스트 2파일.

**Files:** src/renderer/theme/theme-store.ts, theme-provider.tsx, use-theme.ts, __tests__/theme-provider.test.tsx, __tests__/theme-tokens.test.ts, src/renderer/main.tsx (provider wrap), src/renderer/index.html (inline script)

**Verify:** `npm run test -- theme && npm run typecheck:web`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/theme/theme-store.ts","src/renderer/theme/theme-provider.tsx","src/renderer/theme/use-theme.ts","src/renderer/theme/__tests__/theme-provider.test.tsx","src/renderer/theme/__tests__/theme-tokens.test.ts","src/renderer/main.tsx","src/renderer/index.html"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- theme && npm run typecheck:web","acceptanceCriteria":["setTheme/setMode가 attribute+localStorage 동기","initial 깜빡임 방지 inline script","THEMES 6 키 + 필수 필드 테스트","main/preload 참조 0건"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Shell 컴포넌트 (Shell/NavRail/ProjectRail/ShellTopBar/ProfileAvatar/LineIcon)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 시안 shared-components.jsx의 6 컴포넌트를 React+TS+Tailwind로 정식화. 의미 중심 props + 시각은 useTheme() 토큰에서만 분기. 하드코딩 색 0건. 3 테스트 파일(Shell/NavRail/ProfileAvatar). i18n 키 플레이스홀더(shell.rail.*, shell.topbar.*) ko/en 등록.

**Files:** src/renderer/components/shell/{Shell,NavRail,ProjectRail,ShellTopBar,ProfileAvatar,LineIcon}.tsx, src/renderer/components/shell/__tests__/{Shell,NavRail,ProfileAvatar}.test.tsx, src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json

**Verify:** `npm run test -- shell` + `grep -rE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}' src/renderer/components/shell` 0

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/components/shell/Shell.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/NavRail.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/ProjectRail.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/ShellTopBar.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/ProfileAvatar.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/LineIcon.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/__tests__/Shell.test.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/__tests__/NavRail.test.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/__tests__/ProfileAvatar.test.tsx","src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- shell","acceptanceCriteria":["6 테마×2 모드 snapshot pass","shell 디렉토리 하드코딩 색 0건","game 용어 0건","i18n 키 ko/en 동기","ShellTopBar 마케팅 카피 없음"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Primitive 스텁 (Button/Card/Badge/Separator/Tooltip)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R4+ 사용 primitive 5종. Button(shape=auto → miniBtnStyle 자동 매핑), Card(cardTitleStyle bar/divider/ascii), Badge, Separator(Radix), Tooltip(Radix, portal). barrel export. 2 테스트 파일(Button/Card variant snapshot).

**Files:** src/renderer/components/primitives/{button,card,badge,separator,tooltip}.tsx, __tests__/{button,card}.test.tsx, src/renderer/components/index.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- primitives && npm run typecheck:web`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/components/primitives/button.tsx","src/renderer/components/primitives/card.tsx","src/renderer/components/primitives/badge.tsx","src/renderer/components/primitives/separator.tsx","src/renderer/components/primitives/tooltip.tsx","src/renderer/components/primitives/__tests__/button.test.tsx","src/renderer/components/primitives/__tests__/card.test.tsx","src/renderer/components/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- primitives && npm run typecheck:web","acceptanceCriteria":["Button shape=auto 3 테마 분기 snapshot","Card cardTitleStyle 3종 분기","Tooltip Radix portal 동작","하드코딩 색 0건","barrel export 성공"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: App 루트 — Shell 와이어업 + dev theme-switcher
tasks.description:
**Goal:** App.tsx가 Shell 렌더. Shell에 placeholder 데이터 주입, 메인은 t('app.mainPlaceholder') 1줄. ShellTopBar 우측에 dev(`import.meta.env.DEV`)에서만 노출되는 theme-switcher(6 조합). IPC 호출 0건.

**Files:** src/renderer/App.tsx, src/renderer/components/shell/theme-switcher.tsx, src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json

**Verify:** `npm run dev` 수동 + `grep -rE 'XP|CREDITS|\\bLV\\b|MISSION|REWARD|UNLOCK' src/renderer` 0

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/App.tsx","src/renderer/components/shell/theme-switcher.tsx","src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build && npm run typecheck","acceptanceCriteria":["Shell 모든 구역 렌더","theme-switcher 6 조합 전환","persist로 새로고침 후 유지","IPC 호출 0건","game 용어 0건","placeholder t() 경유"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: i18n 도메인 네임스페이스 사전 선언
tasks.description:
**Goal:** R4~R10 대상 도메인(dashboard|messenger|channel|member|project|approval|queue|notification|settings|onboarding|common|error|shell|theme|app) top-level key 선언. ko/en 동기. parser/eslint-plugin 가드 통과.

**Files:** src/renderer/i18n/index.ts, src/renderer/i18n/keys.ts, src/renderer/i18n/locales/{ko,en}.json, i18next-parser.config.js

**Verify:** `npm run i18n:check && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/renderer/i18n/index.ts","src/renderer/i18n/keys.ts","src/renderer/i18n/locales/ko.json","src/renderer/i18n/locales/en.json","i18next-parser.config.js"],"verifyCommand":"npm run i18n:check && npm run lint","acceptanceCriteria":["15 도메인 top-level 빈 객체","ko/en 동일 key set","eslint-plugin-i18next 하드코딩 0건","parser 고아 키 0건"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: legacy channel warning 현황 문서화 + 격리 테스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** router.ts LEGACY_V2_CHANNELS의 5 prefix(chat:*, workspace:*, consensus-folder:*, consensus:*, session:*)를 appendix-legacy-channels.md에 표로 기록(현재 호출 위치는 _legacy/renderer-v1/ 파일 path). R11 마이그레이션 계획 컬럼. 새 renderer가 이 채널들을 호출하지 않음을 legacy-channel-isolation.test.ts로 고정. 제거는 R11.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/specs/appendix-legacy-channels.md, src/renderer/__tests__/legacy-channel-isolation.test.ts

**Verify:** `npm run test -- legacy-channel-isolation`

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/specs/appendix-legacy-channels.md","src/renderer/__tests__/legacy-channel-isolation.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run test -- legacy-channel-isolation","acceptanceCriteria":["5 prefix 하위 채널 전수 열거 (router.ts와 일치)","R11 계획 컬럼 명시","테스트가 새 renderer 호출 0건 확인","negative guard case 포함"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: R3 종료 확인 + R4 진입 체크리스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 전체 typecheck/lint/test/i18n:check/theme:check/build 통과. 6 테마×2 모드 스크린샷(Playwright 자동 또는 수동). spec §10 R3 체크박스 ✓ + 산출물 링크. r3-done-checklist.md. tools/cli-smoke/README 업데이트.

**Files:** docs/superpowers/specs/appendix-r3-evidence/{warm-light,warm-dark,tactical-light,tactical-dark,retro-light,retro-dark}.png, docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md (§10 R3), docs/superpowers/specs/r3-done-checklist.md, tools/cli-smoke/README.md

**Verify:** `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run i18n:check && npm run theme:check && npm run build` 전부 exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files":["docs/superpowers/specs/appendix-r3-evidence/","docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-18-rolestra-design.md","docs/superpowers/specs/r3-done-checklist.md","tools/cli-smoke/README.md"],"verifyCommand":"npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run i18n:check && npm run theme:check && npm run build","acceptanceCriteria":["6 checks exit 0","스크린샷 6장 이상","§10 R3 체크박스 전부 ✓","산출물 링크 채움","R4 진입 체크리스트 문서"]}
```
